{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Mage Tower
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Mage Tower]] has outer walls and internal seals.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Mage Tower]] contains seals on its inside.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
